stemHtml: If, in flight, the needle of a turn and slip indicator is on the left and the ball on the right, the aircraft is:

options.a: turning left with too much left rudder deflection for a co-ordinated turn.
options.b: turning right with not enough left rudder deflection for a co-ordinated turn.
options.c: turning left with not enough left rudder deflection for a co-ordinated turn.
options.d: turning right with too much left rudder deflection for a co-ordinated turn.
